{{Infobox character
| name = Emperor (Cradle)
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Emperor, Emperor of the Blackflame Empire
| abilities = blasts of wind
| affiliations = Blackflame Empire, Skysworn
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Emperor (Cradle) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Naru Huan]], known as [[the Emperor]] of the [[Blackflame Empire]], is an Overlord and the Patriarch of the [[Naru clan]]. He rules over a vast territory that includes the [[Desolate Wilds]] and extends beyond western mountain ranges, though his control over the full scope of the empire has diminished over the last two generations. The imperial lineage established its power by utilizing a source located beneath the empire's birthplace, which was founded after the [[dragons]] that once ruled the land were defeated. [[The Emperor]] maintains his authority through a hierarchy of great clans and servant families, including the Underlords whom he can command to hunt enemies or act as representatives to other powerful groups like the [[Akura clan]]. Physically, [[the Emperor]] is described as a powerfully built man with a square jaw, a neatly trimmed beard, and piercing eyes. He projects an image of strength through his disciplined appearance and regal attire, often wearing [[dragon]]-adorned robes and an ornate crown. He possesses iridescent [[emerald]] wings and wields a high-level weapon forged from the [[Path of Black Flame]]. In terms of combat capability, he is a formidable Overlord capable of matching other high-level opponents. Beyond his role as a ruler, he has previously served as a [[Skysworn]], an empowered judicial force within the empire. He currently manages his realm from his capital and maintains order by gathering his Underlords to address threats to the nation's existence.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Huan]] holds the title of [[the Emperor]] and maintains ownership over the [[Desolate Wilds]]. While his forces possess the capability to cripple an aggressor within a single day should war be openly declared, he is expected to withhold support until a clear winner has emerged. [[Cassias]] maintains a belief that [[the Emperor]] will not permit certain specific actions to take place.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[The Emperor]]'s support will arrive once a winner is made clear.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[The Emperor]]'s forces would cripple an aggressor in a day if war were declared openly.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[The Emperor]] is a figure [[Cassias]] believes will not allow certain actions.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[The Emperor]] holds the title to the [[Desolate Wilds]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Naru Huan]] is [[the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Naru Gwei]] intends to bring word of the situation to [[the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[The Emperor]] is gathering his Underlords.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Skysworn]] serve in the name of [[the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c15">''Skysworn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[The Emperor]] ordered that operations follow [[Naru Gwei]]'s orders.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Speculation arose that [[Eithan]] might be working on behalf of [[the Emperor]]. During the expedition, it was revealed that the journey was fueled by [[the Emperor]]'s own power. This figure appeared wearing green [[sacred artist]]'s robes and possessed [[emerald]] wings along with a [[Blackflame]] [[sword]]. Following these events, [[the Emperor]] of the [[Blackflame Empire]] hosted a celebratory feast.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] may work for [[the Emperor]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The expedition was fueled by [[the Emperor]]’s power.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17">''Underlord'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Emperor]] wore green [[sacred artist]]'s robes and had wings.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Emperor]] possesses a [[Blackflame]] [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Emperor]] of the [[Blackflame Empire]] possesses [[emerald]] wings.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Emperor]] held a celebratory feast.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Huan holds the title of Emperor.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Naru Saeya]] advises [[Lindon]] to present himself to [[the Emperor]] upon returning to the [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Emperor]] is from the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] did not tell [[the Emperor]] about his combat advantages.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Emperor]] can release blasts of wind that tear apart trees.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“You will operate according to Naru Gwei’s orders.”<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“When you make it back to the Empire,” she said, "present yourself to the Emperor. You have done us proud."<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“The Emperor of the…Blackflame Empire? And where is he?”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
